name: PaymentEscrow

methods.name: create_escrow
methods.desc: User deposits ALGO into escrow with a rate-locked amount.

methods.name: create_escrow_asa
methods.desc: User deposits an ASA into escrow.

methods.name: release_escrow
methods.desc:
Release escrowed funds to the solver after confirmed UPI settlement.
Only admin or the solver can call this.

methods.name: refund_escrow
methods.desc:
Refund escrowed funds to the user if expired or dispute resolved in user favor.
Admin or the user can call if the intent has expired.

methods.name: flag_dispute
methods.desc: Flag an escrow as disputed. Either user or solver can dispute.

methods.name: opt_in_asa
methods.desc: Admin opts the contract into an ASA so it can receive ASA deposits.

desc: Holds user crypto in escrow until a solver confirms UPI settlement.
